theme_and_archetype.theme: Hybrid (Dark Luxury Storefront + Clean Light CMS)
theme_and_archetype.vibe: Elegant, direct, visual, premium charcuterie, bodega, aged wood, cinematic

storefront.grid_pattern: MODE A: The 'Tetris' Grid (Asymmetric, wide gaps, negative space). Avoid rigid Bootstrap-style columns.
storefront.hero_overlay: Gradient overlay bg-gradient-to-t from-black/80 via-black/30 to-transparent. Never flat black.

cms.grid_pattern: MODE B: The 'Control Room' Grid. Strict hierarchy, 1px solid borders, no soft drop shadows.
cms.cards: Flat solid surfaces. No glassmorphism in the CMS to ensure perfect data legibility.

storefront_components.product_cards: Cardless design. Large HD image with typography overlaid or placed strictly underneath. Minimal UI chrome.
storefront_components.checkout: Direct, frictionless Stripe integration. No multi-step wizards if possible.
storefront_components.surfaces: Glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/40 border-white/10) for sticky nav and cart.

cms_components.structure: Shadcn UI (heavily customized for thin borders and crisp edges).
cms_components.tables: Shadcn Table with JetBrains Mono for SKUs, prices, and weights.
cms_components.forms: Shadcn Form, Input, Select for CRUD operations.
cms_components.modals: Shadcn Dialog with crisp 0px or 4px border-radius.
cms_components.icons: lucide-react for sharp, consistent internal tooling icons.

storefront.images: Ultra 4K transitions. Subtle scale-up (scale-105) on hover with a slow transition duration (duration-700).
storefront.page_load: Fade in with slight upward translation.

cms.interactions: Instant feedback, minimal animation. Use hover:bg-black/5 for row highlights.

hero_bodega.description: Low light photography of pile of barrels, perfect for dark luxury background.

product_sliced_ham.description: A close up of sliced meat, highly textural.

product_charcuterie_board.description: Gourmet charcuterie board for category or feature sections.

dehesa_countryside.description: Picturesque oak tree in a Spanish field. Good for the 'Our Origins' or 'About' story section.

cutting_process.description: Cutting board texture, raw and authentic.

testing_guidelines.attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case, role-based.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a dual-theme system: The storefront is fundamentally dark and cinematic (black/gold/wood), while the CMS admin panel must be light, clean, and highly structured.
Implement the logo elements via pure typography and CSS where possible: 'LD' in Serif, 'Las Dos Doncellas' in Serif, 'Productos Ibéricos' in script font.
Bypass any 'intro' or 'landing' splash screens. The homepage should immediately function as a high-end storefront with direct purchase capability.
For the CMS: Include superadmin logic (prevent deletion), enforce strict 8-char complex password rules, and implement full traceability for orders and complete CRUD for products.
Use Stripe for the direct checkout flow.
Ensure all storefront images use the provided Unsplash/Pexels media URLs and implement smooth hover scale transitions.
Adhere strictly to the testing guidelines by including data-testid on every interactive element.
